data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a status timeline per conversion push. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or references that demonstrate the existence of such a timeline, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the linked use case outlines the need for a status timeline, but no evidence was found to confirm its implementation or tracking.
gaps: No evidence of a status timeline per conversion push.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
